IconFontCppHeaders Font Awesome header vendored for the editor UI.

- Upstream: https://github.com/juliettef/IconFontCppHeaders
- Source file: IconsFontAwesome6.h
- Local file: IconsFontAwesome.h
- License: see licence.txt in this directory.

The header supplies UTF-8 icon string macros and codepoint ranges that match the
vendored Font Awesome Free 6.7.2 font.
